creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 204934
v0 (has commit message)

The new minor update breaks devel/git-cinnabar, so lets update both together.

https://lkml.org/lkml/2019/6/7/1177
https://github.blog/2019-06-07-highlights-from-git-2-22/

"poudriere bulk -t" passed:
- 11.2 aarch64/amd64/armv6/i386
- 12.0 aarch64/amd64/armv6/armv7/i386
- 13.0 aarch64/amd64/armv6/armv7/i386
- inverted options (on 11.2 i386)
- DEFAULT_VERSIONS += ssl=libressl (on 11.2 amd64)
- DEFAULT_VERSIONS += ssl=libressl-devel (on 11.2 amd64)
- DEFAULT_VERSIONS += ssl=openssl (on 12.0 amd64)
- DEFAULT_VERSIONS += ssl=openssl111 (on 11.2 amd64)
